entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop studied, Arachis Hypogaea, evaluated for yield differences under drought

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental stress condition characterized by limited water availability

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The measure of organic biomass produced by the plant

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The total amount of water transpired by the plant over the season

entities.name: LIMITED IRRIGATION
entities.description: The experimental condition of providing restricted water to the crops

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: The specific medium depth soil type used in the study

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographic location where the research was conducted

entities.name: SHOOT DRY MATTER
entities.description: The dry mass of the above-ground parts of the groundnut genotypes

entities.name: KADIRI 3
entities.description: A specific genotype of groundnut exhibiting rapid extraction front movement and tap root extension

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water loss from the plant, which varied among genotypes during soil water depletion

entities.name: SOIL WATER DEPLETION
entities.description: The state of reduced water availability in the soil profile

entities.name: TAP ROOT EXTENSION RATES
entities.description: The speed of primary root growth, specifically measured in the first 32 days after sowing

entities.name: NC AC 17090
entities.description: A specific genotype of groundnut efficient at extracting water from the upper 40 cm of soil

entities.name: WATER EXTRACTION CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: The patterns and efficiency with which genotypes extract water from the soil profile

entities.name: DRY MATTER:WATER RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of produced dry matter to the amount of water transpired

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total above-ground biomass, associated with drought
